ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date for the market data */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock during the day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock during the day */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the stock traded */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "data_quality_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data quality metrics */,
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the compliance check */,
  "adjusted_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("timestamp", "stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_compliance_id FOREIGN KEY ("compliance_id") REFERENCES compliance ("compliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_data_quality_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_quality_id") REFERENCES data_quality ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol for the stock */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Industry sector of the stock */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Specific industry of the stock */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Initial public offering date of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stock exchange */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the stock exchange */,
  "open_time" TEXT /* Opening time of the exchange */,
  "close_time" TEXT /* Closing time of the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, portfolio manager, trader) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "permissions_list" TEXT /* Detailed list of permissions for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user managing the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the portfolio */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the portfolio was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the portfolio was last updated */,
  "total_value" REAL /* Total value of the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_stocks" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the portfolio */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock in the portfolio */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock was added to the portfolio */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Price at which the stock was purchased */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value of the stock in the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id", "stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock being predicted */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user making the prediction */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was made */,
  "predicted_price" REAL /* Predicted price of the stock */,
  "accuracy" TEXT /* Accuracy of the prediction */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used for the prediction */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "actual_price" REAL /* Actual price of the stock on the prediction date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who generated the report */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock covered in the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report's findings */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, Excel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock the news is about */,
  "news_date" TEXT /* Date when the news was published */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment of the news */,
  "impact_level" TEXT /* Impact level of the news on the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who set up the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock for which the alert is set */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price increase, price decrease) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold for the alert */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, triggered) */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the alert */,
  "alert_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the alert check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the data */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data provided by the source */,
  "api_endpoint" TEXT /* API endpoint for data retrieval */,
  "last_sync" TEXT /* Date of the last synchronization with the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality metric */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date for the market data */,
  "data_accuracy" TEXT /* Accuracy of the data */,
  "data_reliability" TEXT /* Reliability of the data */,
  "quality_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the quality metrics */,
  "quality_score" INTEGER /* Numerical score for the data quality */,
  "quality_check_date" TEXT /* Date when the quality check was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance check */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date for the market data */,
  "regulation" TEXT /* Regulation checked */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of compliance */,
  "compliance_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the compliance check */,
  "compliance_score" INTEGER /* Numerical score for the compliance status */,
  "compliance_check_date" TEXT /* Date when the compliance check was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id")
)
